message:
feat(tui): add regression snapshot tests for state components (ntm-952.1.4)

Add comprehensive layout regression tests covering:
- EmptyState, LoadingState, ErrorState across narrow/split/wide tiers
- HelpOverlay structure stability and tier adaptation
- Truncation consistency at narrow widths
- HelpBar progressive hint dropping
- Alignment mode verification

Tests verify rendering consistency across width tiers (60/140/220) to
catch accidental layout drift in CI.
